metadata.description: Review queue for supplier registry records that should not create catalog rows or normalization mappings until explicitly approved.

eden_botanicals:ylang-ylang-i-organic.reason: Distinct fractional grade from Eden with no existing app row.
guardrails: Do not invent chemistry or IFRA data during import.

Only add helper chemistry if a trusted canonical source is later established.
